content.en:
Hanhai District Boundary.

Ye Tian came back and brought Qingxuan Daozu with him.

Qingxuan Dao Ancestor is a half-step eight-fold ancestor, and he is also a Dao ancestor who has comprehended the nine-fold Yuan Dao, and his strength crushes those half-step eightfold ancestors in the Hanhai District Boundary, and his strength is very strong.

Bringing Qingxuan Daozu with you can at least avoid some trouble.

......

"Immortal Blood Dao Ancestor, what is the situation of that ancient nest in the Hanhai District Boundary now?"

After Ye Tian came back, he immediately met the owner of the Hanhai Yellow Building, the Immortal Blood Dao Ancestor, and asked.

The Immortal Blood Dao Ancestor said solemnly: "I've been there, but I can't enter, so I can only clean up the Primordial Artifact near that Ancient Nest by the way, but it attracted a Primordial Artifact comparable to the weaker Eightfold Primordial Ancestor level, so I retreated!"

Although his strength was very strong, it was difficult to kill a weaker Eightfold Primordial Ancestor-level Primordial Artifact, so he had to give up.

Subsequently, he learned from the mouth of the Immortal Blood Dao Ancestor that the current Hanhai District Boundary had not sent anyone over since the first time it had sent some Sevenfold Origin Ancestors into that Growing Ancient Nest, and had only spied on the situation nearby.

However, there are more and more Dao Ancestors gathered there, if it is not covered by a formation, otherwise these Dao Ancestors will have attracted countless powerful Dao Ancestors on the Silent Black Sea.

Soon.

A large number of sevenfold ancestors of the Nine-Story Building used the Hanhai Yellow Building as a transit and quickly came to the boundary of the Hanhai District.

At present, except for the Nine-Fold Building, several other top forces have been a little slower to get the news, so they have not sent the Sevenfold Ancestor over yet.

Of course.

The number of Sevenfold Origin Ancestors sent by the Nine-Fold Building is not large, and there are only a few thousand, but these thousands of Sevenfold Origin Ancestors are all official members, and each of them is very rebellious, and their combat power is very terrifying.

Some of these Sevenfold Origin Ancestors peak-level Dao Ancestors have a combat power that is even more powerful than those half-step Eightfold Origin Ancestors in the Hanhai Region Realm, and the best of them can even those half-step Eightfold Origin Ancestors in an instant.

Ye Tian's current strength is simply much weaker than theirs.

However, he was not worried that he would fall, and his life-saving ability was not comparable to those Sevenfold Primordial Ancestors.

That's his strength!

......

Outside the growing nest.

Inside one of the bases.

Ye Tian and Qingxuan Daozu came here and met Gushan Daozu here.

"Endless Dao Ancestor, you're here!"

Gu Mountain Dao Ancestor said respectfully.

Now Ye Tian's status and strength are far from being comparable to those in the past, so he is more respectful to Ye Tian.

"Gu Mountain Dao Ancestor, your Yuan Dao is about to reach the limit realm, it seems that it won't be long before you can become an Eightfold Origin Ancestor!

Ye Tian congratulated.

"This achievement of mine is not worth mentioning compared to that of the Endless Dao Ancestor!"

Gu Mountain Dao Ancestor hurriedly said.

At the same time, he was also a little curious, he was about to comprehend the matter of the Extreme Yuan Dao, how could Ye Tian know?

What he didn't know was that Ye Tian's Endless Yuan Dao had reached the limit realm.

In the Yuan Dao realm, Ye Tian was taller than him, plus he was close to breaking through, and the Yuan Dao aura on his body could hardly hide from Ye Tian, so Ye Tian saw through it at a glance.

Soon.

Gu Mountain Dao Ancestor noticed Qing Xuan Dao Ancestor beside Ye Tian, and his pupils suddenly shrank.

He can sense the aura of Qingxuan Dao Ancestor, which is much stronger than him!

"It's definitely a Dao Ancestor who has comprehended the Ninefold Yuan Dao!"

Gu Mountain Dao Ancestor secretly said.

And Qingxuan Dao Ancestor followed Ye Tian's side, like a servant.

Immediately, he thought that some of the official members with high status in the Nine Stories Building had servants, presumably Qingxuan Dao Ancestor was Ye Tian's servant.

At the thought of this, he suddenly gasped.

"The Endless Dao Ancestor actually has a half-step eightfold Origin Ancestor servant who comprehends the Ninefold Yuan Dao!"

He thought that his current strength and status were not even comparable to Ye Tian's servants, and he suddenly felt a little emotional.

It didn't take long for the Growing Ancient Nest to gather a large number of Sevenfold Ancestors.

Of course, there are also many eightfold ancestors of the Nine-Story Building who come to control and prevent the appearance of powerful primordial antiquities.

Even the half-step Ninefold Ancestor who secretly hid the Nine-Fold Building was not impossible.

Soon, many of the Sevenfold Ancestors were ready to enter this growing nest.

Airplanes!!!!

The dense Sevenfold Ancestors entered the black mist, and those Eightfold Ancestors and the Half-Step Eightfold Ancestors were responsible for cleaning up these primordial artifacts and clearing a passage for the Sevenfold Ancestors.

Ye Tian did not act with the Sevenfold Ancestor army of the Nine-Story Building, but acted alone.

Before entering this ancient nest, Qingxuan Daozu cleaned up the original antiquities around him.

Soon, Ye Tian entered one of the entrances of this ancient nest.

"Qingxuan Dao Ancestor, you just stay nearby!"

Ye Tian ordered.

"Yes, Lord Endless Dao Ancestor!" Qing Xuan Dao Ancestor replied respectfully.

......

Ye Tian entered the interior of the Growing Ancient Live, and soon encountered a large number of primordial antiquities, there were many, many of them, but there were also many sevenfold primordial ancestors who entered here.

Therefore, Ye Tian's pressure was not too great.

Bang!!!

Ye Tian struck out with all his strength, and with the Supreme Yuan Dao Control Technique Endless Golden Spear, he killed a primordial artifact comparable to the sevenfold primordial ancestor level, and the remnants of the primordial artifact were everywhere around.

Among the items that were helpful to him, he put them away directly.

However, some of the primordial antiquities were very special, and their strength was terrifying, even Ye Tian couldn't kill them, so he could only choose to avoid them.

this day.

Ye Tian found primordial artifacts similar to golden ropes inside this ancient nest, and he was immediately very happy.

"It turned out to be the original antiquity-Golden Rope Grass!"

This kind of primordial artifact is extremely rare, once it is killed, you can harvest a special golden substance, which can greatly increase the will of the Extreme Dao, make the will of the Extreme Dao stronger and stronger, and can also improve the quality of the will of the Extreme Dao.

In the nine-story building, there is the task of purchasing golden rope grass.

Soon.

Ye Tian killed some golden rope grass and harvested drops of golden substance.

And the Dao Ancestor who discovered the Golden Rope Grass was not the only one Ye Tian, and there were other good things that were discovered.

As a result, the nine-story building paid more attention to this growing ancient nest.

As time passed, more and more of the Sevenfold Ancestors of the Nine-Story Building came here.

Not only that, but the Nine-Storied Building also sent several of the top Sevenfold Peak Ancestors to enter the core area of this Growing Ancient Nest with a seedling of the Devouring Life-Devouring Tree and take root and plant it.

All of a sudden, countless primordial artifacts rushed towards the Devouring Tree of Life.

Fortunately, the Dao Ancestors of the Nine-Story Building had already arranged a large number of formations here to intercept these primordial antiquities.

Therefore, in a short period of time, these primordial artifacts were unable to break through the magic circle and destroy the Devouring Tree of Life.
